steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The student must emphasize a similarity between the two countries. The notes reveal that both the Philippines and Liechtenstein share the same property: their capital is not their most populous city. This is the similarity to express.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
Choice A directly conveys this—it states that in both countries, the capital is not the most populous city.
The other three options either narrow to one country, list facts without establishing a connection, or miss the capitals-versus-largest-cities comparison entirely.
That matches choice A — A is correct.
